chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2980 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ PRESENT: Mr. Justice Aqeel Ahmed Abbasi Mr. Justice Abdul Mobeen Lakho FRESH CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.19418/2023 (Urgent). 2. For order on CMA No.13752/2022 (Exemption). 3. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 4th September 2023 Petitioner is called absent, no intimation is received. Instant petition was filed on 29.04.2021, however, thereafter the petitioner did not pursue instant matter and was called absent on 02.02.2022, when the matter was fixed in Court, whereas, on 26.05.2022 it was observed by the Divisional Bench of this Court that no details of the property subject matter of this petition has been mentioned in the memo of petition, nor in the prayer clause, therefore, the petitioner was directed to redraft the petition and specify the details of the land subject matter of this petition. However, it appears that the needful has not been done. Today, the matter is fixed in Court on urgent application filed by the petitioner, who has chosen to remain absent without any intimation. Perusal of the contents of the petition reflects that neither any cause of grievance is available to the petitioner, nor any material has been placed on record to justify filing of instant petition or the relief being sought through instant petition, which otherwise is vague and contains the generalize allegations. It has been observed that similar petitions filed by the same petitioner have been dismissed, whereas, office has directed not to entertain such petitions, which do not disclose any cause of grievance, nor the relief being sought is covered under Article 199 of the Constitution in view of the serious disputed facts agitated by the petitioner.

Perusal of the contents of the petition reflects that neither any cause of grievance is available to the petitioner, nor any material has been placed on record to justify filing of instant petition or the relief being sought through instant petition, which otherwise is vague and contains the generalize allegations. It has been observed that similar petitions filed by the same petitioner have been dismissed, whereas, office has directed not to entertain such petitions, which do not disclose any cause of grievance, nor the relief being sought is covered under Article 199 of the Constitution in view of the serious disputed facts agitated by the petitioner. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed alongwith listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E *Farhan/PS*
